items.title: Annual Alumni Reunion 2025
items.description: Annual gathering bringing together graduates across cohorts for keynote talks, portfolio showcases, and networking sessions.
items.descriptionZh: 年度系友聚會，匯聚跨屆畢業生進行專題演講、作品展示與交流活動。

items.title: Alumni Mentorship Kickoff
items.description: Launch event pairing senior alumni mentors with current students for one-on-one career guidance throughout the year.
items.descriptionZh: 啟動儀式，由資深系友與在校學生配對，提供整年度一對一職涯指導。

items.title: Alumni Design Forum: Future of AI in Visual Storytelling
items.title_zh: 系友設計論壇：AI 與視覺敘事的未來
items.description: Forum hosted by alumni discussing the impact of AI on the next decade of communications design.
items.descriptionZh: 由系友主辦的論壇，探討 AI 對下一個十年媒體傳達設計的影響。
